meta.name: N'Ko Unified Proverbs Database
meta.description: Consolidated proverbs from all sources in the NKo monorepo. Zero loss tolerance — every proverb preserved.
meta.dedup_strategy: Normalized Latin transliteration comparison + semantic similarity. Near-duplicates flagged but ALL unique entries kept. See dedup_flags field.

schema.text_nko: N'Ko script text (primary, may be null if source lacked it)
schema.meaning: Extended explanation of the proverb's meaning/wisdom
schema.applied_context: How the proverb applies in practice (from code-wisdom or cultural engine)
schema.contexts: Array of usage contexts (when to use this proverb)
schema.formality: Social register (intimate, casual, respectful, formal, ceremonial)
schema.code_patterns: Programming patterns this maps to (from code-wisdom, if applicable)
schema.dedup_flags: Array of IDs this is a near-duplicate of (empty if unique)

proverbs.text_latin: Mɔgɔ tɛ se ka jiri bɛɛ farakolo kɔnɔ.
proverbs.english_translation: One cannot hold all trees in one armpit.
proverbs.meaning: No one can do everything alone. We all need help from others.

proverbs.text_latin: Hakili ka fisa ni wari ye.
proverbs.english_translation: Wisdom is better than money.
proverbs.meaning: Knowledge and good judgment are more valuable than wealth.

proverbs.text_latin: Sira tɛ kelen ye.
proverbs.english_translation: The road is not one.
proverbs.meaning: There are many paths to reach your goal.

proverbs.text_latin: Jɛ ka fisa ni baarakɛ ye.
proverbs.english_translation: Unity is better than work.
proverbs.meaning: Working together achieves more than working alone.

proverbs.text_latin: Kuma man di, nka a bɛ fɔ.
proverbs.english_translation: The word is not sweet, but it must be said.
proverbs.meaning: Sometimes difficult truths need to be spoken.

proverbs.text_latin: Dusu ka bon ni waritigi ye.
proverbs.english_translation: A big heart is greater than a rich person.
proverbs.meaning: Generosity of spirit matters more than material wealth.

proverbs.text_latin: Balo bɛ sɔn bɔ.
proverbs.english_translation: Life comes from patience.
proverbs.meaning: Patience is essential for survival and success.

proverbs.text_latin: Mɔgɔ kɔnɔ ye mɔgɔ ye.
proverbs.english_translation: The inside of a person is the person.
proverbs.meaning: Character defines who you truly are, not appearances.

proverbs.text_latin: Tuma tɛ mɔgɔ ma, mɔgɔ bɛ tuma ma.
proverbs.english_translation: Time is not for man, man is for time.
proverbs.meaning: We must adapt to circumstances, not expect them to adapt to us.

proverbs.text_latin: Muso ɲuman ye so ɲuman ye.
proverbs.english_translation: A good woman makes a good home.
proverbs.meaning: The strength of a family often comes from its women.

proverbs.text_latin: Yɛlɛma bɛ ɲɛ na.
proverbs.english_translation: Change is before us.
proverbs.meaning: Change is inevitable and always approaching.

proverbs.text_latin: Baa tɛ a faga, baa tɛ a balo.
proverbs.english_translation: The river doesn't kill it, the river doesn't feed it.
proverbs.meaning: Some forces neither help nor harm—they simply exist.

proverbs.text_latin: Sababu tɛ baara la.
proverbs.english_translation: There is no excuse in work.
proverbs.meaning: Hard work speaks for itself; excuses don't matter.

proverbs.text_latin: Nkalontan ye tila ye.
proverbs.english_translation: Truth is the sun.
proverbs.meaning: Truth always shines through eventually.

proverbs.text_latin: Den ye wari ye.
proverbs.english_translation: A child is wealth.
proverbs.meaning: Children are the greatest treasure.

proverbs.text_latin: Kontondila fila man ɲi.
proverbs.english_translation: Two captains are not good.
proverbs.meaning: Too many leaders spoil the mission.

proverbs.text_latin: Ñing fanang buka taa kewo.
proverbs.english_translation: This too shall pass.
proverbs.meaning: No hardship lasts forever.

proverbs.text_latin: Moo bete mu dookuo le ti.
proverbs.english_translation: A good person is known by their deeds.
proverbs.meaning: Actions reveal true character.

proverbs.text_latin: Kuu kiling be moo buunya.
proverbs.english_translation: One matter humbles a person.
proverbs.meaning: Everyone has their weakness.

proverbs.text_latin: Kambaning buka laa a faamaa kono.
proverbs.english_translation: A baby doesn't sleep in its father's belly.
proverbs.meaning: Each person must carry their own burden.

proverbs.text_latin: Dɔɔnin dɔɔnin bɛ wara so.
proverbs.english_translation: Little by little, the lion's den is reached.
proverbs.meaning: Patience and persistence lead to great achievements.

proverbs.text_latin: Ko kɔrɔ ye ko kura ba ye.
proverbs.english_translation: An old thing is the mother of a new thing.
proverbs.meaning: The past informs and creates the future.

proverbs.text_latin: Mɔgɔ si tɛ bɔ jiri kelen na.
proverbs.english_translation: No one comes from a single tree.
proverbs.meaning: Everyone has a community and roots.

proverbs.text_latin: Jatigi ɲuman ka fisa ni wari ye.
proverbs.english_translation: A good host is better than money.
proverbs.meaning: Hospitality and kindness outweigh material possessions.

proverbs.text_nko: ߞߊ߬ߙߊ߲߬ߘߋ߲ ߡߊ߲߬ ߛߋ߫ ߞߍ߫ ߟߊ߫ ߘߐ߬ߕߋ ߘߌ߫ ߣߊ ߘߌ߫
proverbs.text_latin: Karandeli man se ke la dote di na di
proverbs.english_translation: Learning cannot be done in one day
proverbs.literal_translation: Learning cannot be done in one day
proverbs.meaning: Mastery takes time and patience

proverbs.text_nko: ߡߐ߰ ߞߋ߬ߟߋ߲߬ ߞߊ߲ ߦߋ߫ ߞߊ߬ ߞߎ߲߬ ߛߎ߲ ߠߎ߬ ߡߍ߲
proverbs.text_latin: Mo kelen kan ye ka kun sun lu men
proverbs.english_translation: One head has more than one idea
proverbs.literal_translation: One head has more than one idea
proverbs.meaning: Diverse perspectives lead to better solutions

proverbs.text_latin: Boloma ma tinin sodong
proverbs.english_translation: The arm has not forgotten its owner
proverbs.literal_translation: The arm has not forgotten its owner
proverbs.meaning: Help will come from those closest to you

proverbs.text_nko: ߓߊ߬ߙߊ ߦߋ߫ ߖߊ߬ߕߋ ߟߊ ߟߋ ߘߌ߫
proverbs.text_latin: Bara ye jate la le di
proverbs.english_translation: Work is in the measurement
proverbs.literal_translation: Work is in the measurement
proverbs.meaning: Success comes from consistent effort

proverbs.text_nko: ߣߌ߫ ߌ ߡߊ߫ ߛߋ߫ ߟߊߣߐ߰ ߟߊ߫، ߌ ߘߌ߫ ߛߋ߫ ߟߊߡߌ߬ߣߊ߬ ߟߊ߫
proverbs.text_latin: Ni i ma se lanon la, i di se laminana la
proverbs.english_translation: If you can't run, you can walk
proverbs.literal_translation: If you can't run, you can walk
proverbs.meaning: Progress at your own pace is still progress

proverbs.text_nko: ߓߏ߬ߟߏ ߞߋ߬ߟߋ߲߬ ߕߍ߫ ߛߋ߫ ߞߊ߬ ߝߊ߬ߟߌ ߡߌ߬ߣߊ߬ ߟߊ߫
proverbs.text_latin: Bolo kelen te se ka fali minana la
proverbs.english_translation: One hand cannot catch a donkey
proverbs.literal_translation: One hand cannot catch a donkey
proverbs.meaning: Complex tasks require cooperation

proverbs.text_nko: ߘߋ߲ ߠߎ߬ ߦߋ߫ ߛߌ߬ߟߊ߬ ߟߊ߫ ߞߊ߬ ߓߐ߫ ߘߎ߱ ߟߊ߫
proverbs.text_latin: Den lu ye sila la ka bo dugu la
proverbs.english_translation: Children are roads leading from the village
proverbs.literal_translation: Children are roads leading from the village
proverbs.meaning: Children carry forward the community's legacy

proverbs.text_nko: ߕߎ߬ߢߊ ߦߋ߫ ߞߐ߲߫ ߘߐ߫، ߣߴ ߊ߬ ߞߎ߲߬ ߛߊ߬ߣߴ ߊ߬ ߓߐ߫ ߕߎ߬ߡߊ ߘߐ߫
proverbs.text_latin: Tunya ye kon do, n' a kun san' a bo tuma do
proverbs.english_translation: Truth is at the bottom; even if the head dies, it emerges in time
proverbs.literal_translation: Truth is at the bottom; even if the head dies, it emerges in time
proverbs.meaning: The truth always comes out eventually

proverbs.text_nko: ߡߐ߱ ߕߐ߯ ߞߊ߫ ߓߏ߲߬ ߣߴ ߊ߬ ߖߊ߲ ߘߌ߫
proverbs.text_latin: Mo to ka bon n' a jan di
proverbs.english_translation: A person's name is greater than their height
proverbs.literal_translation: A person's name is greater than their height
proverbs.meaning: Reputation matters more than appearance

proverbs.text_latin: Munya ye dabolo le di
proverbs.english_translation: Patience is a door handle
proverbs.literal_translation: Patience is a door handle
proverbs.meaning: Patience opens all doors

proverbs.text_nko: ߞߐ ߕߍ߫ ߕߊ߯ ߟߊ߫ ߸ ߖߊ߯ ߓߊ ߓߍ߫ ߊ߬ ߝߍ߬
proverbs.text_latin: ko te ta la, ja ba be a fe
proverbs.english_translation: Where there's a will, there's a way
proverbs.literal_translation: A thing doesn't fail to go, there's always a path beside it
proverbs.meaning: Encouragement when facing obstacles

proverbs.text_nko: ߡߐ߰ ߞߋߟߋ߲ ߕߍ߫ ߛߋ߫ ߞߊ߬ ߘߎ߱ ߟߊߓߐ߫
proverbs.text_latin: mɔgɔ kelen te se ka dugu labɔ
proverbs.english_translation: One person cannot build a village alone
proverbs.literal_translation: One person cannot found a village
proverbs.meaning: Emphasizing community cooperation

proverbs.text_nko: ߛߌ߬ ߞߊ߲߬ ߕߍ߫ ߞߍ߫ ߝߊߣߊ߲ ߕߋ߲߬ ߠߊ߫
proverbs.text_latin: si kan te ke fanan ten la
proverbs.english_translation: Every family has its own way
proverbs.literal_translation: On no family is it done the same
proverbs.meaning: Acknowledging diversity of customs

proverbs.text_nko: ߘߋ߲ ߡߍ߲ ߕߍ߫ ߞߊ߬ߛߌ߫ ߟߊ߫ ߸ ߊ߬ ߕߍ߫ ߘߍ߲߬ ߟߊ߫
proverbs.text_latin: den min te kasi la, a te den la
proverbs.english_translation: A child who doesn't cry won't be nursed
proverbs.literal_translation: The child who doesn't cry won't be suckled
proverbs.meaning: Speak up for what you need

proverbs.text_latin: ba te wa ko fe
proverbs.english_translation: The river doesn't go backwards
proverbs.meaning: Handle errors gracefully and move forward. Don't retry infinitely or ignore failures.
proverbs.applied_context: Handle errors gracefully and move forward. Don't retry infinitely or ignore failures.

proverbs.text_latin: bolo kelen te buru ta
proverbs.english_translation: One hand cannot grab flour
proverbs.meaning: Complex tasks require collaboration. Design for composition.
proverbs.applied_context: Complex tasks require collaboration. Design for composition.

proverbs.text_latin: kun kelen te gara ta
proverbs.english_translation: One head doesn't carry the roof
proverbs.meaning: Distribute responsibility. No single component should do everything.
proverbs.applied_context: Distribute responsibility. No single component should do everything.

proverbs.text_nko: ߡߐ߱ ߛߌ߬ ߕߍ ߓߐ߫ ߝߊ߲߬ ߞߋߟߋ߲ ߠߊ߫
proverbs.text_latin: moo si te bo fan kelen la
proverbs.english_translation: No person comes from one direction only
proverbs.meaning: Modules should accept diverse inputs. Don't assume a single use case.
proverbs.applied_context: Modules should accept diverse inputs. Don't assume a single use case.

proverbs.text_latin: nyewula ye nama
proverbs.english_translation: Patience is wisdom
proverbs.meaning: Async operations require patience. Don't block—await with grace.
proverbs.applied_context: Async operations require patience. Don't block—await with grace.

proverbs.text_nko: ߊ ߢߣߊ ߟߊ ߦߋ ߊ ߛߓߍ ߘߐ
proverbs.text_latin: a nyinala ye a sebe do
proverbs.english_translation: What is sought is found in writing
proverbs.meaning: Document what future readers will seek. Good docs are found, not searched.
proverbs.applied_context: Document what future readers will seek. Good docs are found, not searched.

proverbs.text_latin: tile ye la wala su
proverbs.english_translation: The sun is there whether day or night
proverbs.meaning: Truth in code persists. Write honest documentation that ages well.
proverbs.applied_context: Truth in code persists. Write honest documentation that ages well.

proverbs.text_latin: jo bolo ye jabi
proverbs.english_translation: The hand of learning is response
proverbs.meaning: Iterate based on feedback. Learning happens through dialogue with the system.
proverbs.applied_context: Iterate based on feedback. Learning happens through dialogue with the system.

proverbs.text_latin: to ye tin ko
proverbs.english_translation: Existence is everything
proverbs.meaning: State is precious. Manage it intentionally—existence matters.
proverbs.applied_context: State is precious. Manage it intentionally—existence matters.

proverbs.text_latin: lonni ye sen la
proverbs.english_translation: Knowledge is power
proverbs.meaning: Code that teaches is code that lasts. Self-documenting beats clever.
proverbs.applied_context: Code that teaches is code that lasts. Self-documenting beats clever.

proverbs.text_nko: ߛߌ߲ߘߌ ߓߍ ߖߐ ߟߊ ߞߏ߯ ߛߎ ߓߘߊ
proverbs.text_latin: sindi be jo la ko su banda
proverbs.english_translation: AI learns endlessly like the night sky
proverbs.meaning: Build systems that learn and improve. Static code becomes legacy.
proverbs.applied_context: Build systems that learn and improve. Static code becomes legacy.

proverbs.text_latin: kan kun ye di
proverbs.english_translation: The essence of language is sweet
proverbs.meaning: APIs should be pleasant to use. Good interfaces feel natural.
proverbs.applied_context: APIs should be pleasant to use. Good interfaces feel natural.

proverbs.text_latin: konko ye kan kura
proverbs.english_translation: Code is a new language
proverbs.meaning: Treat code as language—expressiveness matters as much as correctness.
proverbs.applied_context: Treat code as language—expressiveness matters as much as correctness.

proverbs.text_latin: nko ye an sebe
proverbs.english_translation: N'Ko is our writing
proverbs.meaning: Own your tools. Custom solutions for unique problems beat generic defaults.
proverbs.applied_context: Own your tools. Custom solutions for unique problems beat generic defaults.

proverbs.text_latin: hakili ma si ye kelen
proverbs.english_translation: No two minds are the same
proverbs.meaning: Design for diversity. Users, inputs, and contexts will vary.
proverbs.applied_context: Design for diversity. Users, inputs, and contexts will vary.

proverbs.text_latin: sɔ te yan
proverbs.english_translation: Don't expect the impossible
proverbs.literal_translation: There is no horse here
proverbs.meaning: Don't expect the impossible

proverbs.text_latin: mɔgɔ ka fanga sɔrɔ
proverbs.english_translation: Strength comes through community
proverbs.literal_translation: A person finds strength
proverbs.meaning: Strength comes through community

proverbs.text_nko: ߓߏ߬ߟߏ ߘߏ߫ ߕߍ߫ ߞߊ߬ ߡߏ߬ߙߌ ߕߏ߫
proverbs.text_latin: bolo dɔ te ka mori to
proverbs.english_translation: Cooperation is necessary
proverbs.literal_translation: One hand cannot tie a bundle
proverbs.meaning: Cooperation is necessary

proverbs.text_latin: kunna man ka ju
proverbs.english_translation: Education is invaluable
proverbs.literal_translation: Knowledge is not expensive
proverbs.meaning: Education is invaluable

proverbs.text_latin: sɔ ma bɔn jɔ
proverbs.english_translation: Be grateful, don't take things for granted
proverbs.literal_translation: The horse did not build the stable
proverbs.meaning: Be grateful, don't take things for granted

proverbs.text_latin: kɔ ma wa a ji ma
proverbs.english_translation: We cannot see our own faults
proverbs.literal_translation: The back did not see its own water
proverbs.meaning: We cannot see our own faults

proverbs.text_latin: Mɔgɔ tɛ bɔ jɔ ye a dugu
proverbs.english_translation: Person is not separate from their village
proverbs.meaning: Community defines identity — a person and their people are inseparable
proverbs.applied_context: Smart compose proverb completion pair: 'ߡߐ߱ ߕߍ߫ ߓߐ߫' → 'ߖߐ ߦߋ߫ ߊ߬ ߘߐ߫'

proverbs.text_latin: Kun ba ma ka mɔgɔ to yen
proverbs.english_translation: A big head does not leave a person there
proverbs.meaning: Intelligence or arrogance alone won't save you; community matters
proverbs.applied_context: Smart compose proverb completion pair: 'ߞߎ߲߬ ߓߊ߫' → 'ߡߊ ߞߊ߬ ߡߐ߱ ߕߏ߫ ߦߋ߲߬'

proverbs.text_latin: Namaya ye baara di
proverbs.english_translation: Life is work
proverbs.meaning: Living requires effort — work is inseparable from existence
proverbs.applied_context: Smart compose proverb completion pair: 'ߣߊ߬ߡߦߊ ߦߋ߫' → 'ߓߊ߯ߙߊ ߘߌ߫'
